title: turnera viscosa
intro: Turnera viscosa, also known as West Indian sage, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turnera viscosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the management of blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Turnera viscosa can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
